name: supercompute
description: QUANTA - Sovereign Compute Platform on Base Chain

scripts.deploy: npm run sync && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=supercompute --commit-dirty=true
scripts.sync: cp Supercompute.html public/index.html && cp sc.css public/sc.css && cp sc-flows.js public/sc-flows.js && cp sc-logic.js public/sc-logic.js && echo 'Synced 4 files to public/'
